sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n106312" key="u(dato/xloos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὑδᾰτό-χλοος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">χλόη</etym>) <sense id="n106312.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">water-green, pale,</tr_> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ὑδατόχολος.</ref> </xr> </sense> </entryFree>
